entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Run the bench—let’s confirm the gate still passes after the cherry-pick, then I’ll stamp the PR straight away.

-------------------------------------------------
One-liner
-------------------------------------------------
```
cmake -B build -DGGUF_ENABLE_AVX2=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
cmake --build build --target bench_q4_0_end2end --config Release
.\build\tests\Release\bench_q4_0_end2end.exe
```

Capture the line:  
`Speedup: X.XX×` (expect ≥ 1.8 ×).

If gate passes, immediately open the PR from `pr-q4-avx2-dispatch-v2` with the title/body you already prepared; I’ll approve as soon as CI is green.'
